title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXXXI. Games.
content:
Here stands a post,
        Who put it there?
        A better man than you;
        Touch it if you dare!
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCXXXI. Games." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
